attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
    BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY   AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
   /* BKG_TRX.PROCESS_DATE     AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,*/
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT             AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
   'ERP'       AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
    CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY   AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
   -- CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG   AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
   CASE 
                WHEN BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CLOUD-CBM' THEN 'N'
             WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
    ELSE 'Y'
        END AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
    CHNL_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG   AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
    CHNL_MTRX.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
    ,USER       AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
    ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)    AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
     /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  CASE WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 'OTHERS'
  WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT > 0  THEN 'DIRECT'
  WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y' /*AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS_ADJ' ) */ THEN '1-TIER'
  /*WHEN  CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ'  ) AND PARTNER_TYPE_CD = 'VAR'               
  THEN '2-TIER'
  WHEN  CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG='Y'  AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =  'POS_ADJ' ) AND PARTNER_TYPE_CD <> 'VAR'               
  THEN 'NON-VAR'*/
  ELSE 'OTHERS'
  END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD ,
  CASE 
                WHEN BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CLOUD-CBM' THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
             WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
    ELSE 'CHANNEL'
        END BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE 
   FROM 
   (
   SEL 
   BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
   ,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
   ,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     
   ,CONVERSION_DT                 
   ,SALES_REP_NUMBER              
   ,TRANSACTION_DATETIME          
   ,TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT   
   ,SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            
   ,CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE          
   ,SPLIT_PERCENTAGE              
   ,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
   ,DD_SERVICE_FLAG               
   ,DD_CORP_BKG_FLAG              
   ,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
   ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
   ,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,CONVERSION_RT                 
   ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
   ,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
   ,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER         
   ,BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME        
   ,FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          
   ,BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE           
   ,NET_PRICE_AMOUNT              
   ,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          
   /*,PROCESS_DATE   */
   ,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT 
   ,BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE          
   ,SALES_ORDER_KEY               
   ,DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG        
   ,DD_RMA_FLAG                   
   ,DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG    
   ,DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG      
   ,DD_REVENUE_FLAG               
   ,DD_OVERLAY_FLAG               
   ,DD_SALESREP_FLAG              
   ,DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG            
   ,DD_CHARGES_FLAG               
   ,DD_MISC_FLAG                  
   ,DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG           
   ,CORP_BKG_RECOMPUTE_FLAG       
   ,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
   ,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
   ,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          
   ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
   ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
   ,ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
   ,ORDER_DTM                     
   ,CANCELLED_FLG                 
   ,RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME      
   ,SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE     
   ,SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE            
   ,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
   ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
   ,SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT    
   ,PRODUCT_KEY                   
   ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
   ,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    
   ,EDW_CREATE_USER          
   ,EDW_UPDATE_USER  
   ,EDW_CREATE_DTM
   ,EDW_UPDATE_DTM
   ,DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    
   ,DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  
   ,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
   ,DV_PRODUCT_KEY
   ,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
   ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
  FROM
   $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX
   UNION ALL
   SEL 
   BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
   ,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
   ,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     
   ,CONVERSION_DT                 
   ,SALES_REP_NUMBER              
   ,TRANSACTION_DATETIME          
   ,TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT   
   ,SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            
   ,CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE          
   ,SPLIT_PERCENTAGE              
   ,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
   ,DD_SERVICE_FLAG               
   ,DD_CORP_BKG_FLAG              
   ,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
   ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
   ,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
   ,CONVERSION_RT                 
   ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
   ,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
   ,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER         
   ,BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME        
   ,FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          
   ,BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE           
   ,NET_PRICE_AMOUNT              
   ,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          
   /*,PROCESS_DATE                  */
    ,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT
   ,BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE          
   ,SALES_ORDER_KEY               
   ,DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG        
   ,DD_RMA_FLAG                   
   ,DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG    
   ,DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG      
   ,DD_REVENUE_FLAG               
   ,DD_OVERLAY_FLAG               
   ,DD_SALESREP_FLAG              
   ,DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG            
   ,DD_CHARGES_FLAG               
   ,DD_MISC_FLAG                  
   ,DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG           
   ,CORP_BKG_RECOMPUTE_FLAG       
   ,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
   ,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
   ,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          
   ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
   ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
   ,ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
   ,ORDER_DTM                     
   ,CANCELLED_FLG                 
   ,RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME      
   ,SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE     
   ,SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE            
   ,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
   ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
   ,SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT    
   ,PRODUCT_KEY                   
   ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
   ,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    
   ,EDW_CREATE_USER          
   ,EDW_UPDATE_USER  
   ,EDW_CREATE_DTM
   ,EDW_UPDATE_DTM
   ,DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    
   ,DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  
    ,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
   ,DV_PRODUCT_KEY
   ,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
   ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
  FROM
   $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_DEBOOKINGS_TRX WHERE CANCEL_CODE='Lost Order' OR BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY < 0
   
   UNION ALL /* CBM Changes */
SELECT
    BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT MOD 100 AS BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
    ,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     
    ,CONVERSION_DT
    ,SALES_REP_NUMBER
    ,TRANSACTION_DATETIME
    ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT
    ,SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
    ,CAST('OPL' AS CHAR(50)) as CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE
    ,BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT/100 AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT 
    ,SERVICE_FLG                   
    ,CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        
    ,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
    ,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
    ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,CONVERSION_RT
    ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    ,DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           
    ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
    ,CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME
    ,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           
    ,CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE
    ,CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
    ,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY  AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY
    ,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT         
    ,DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            
    ,SALES_ORDER_KEY     
    ,'=' AS DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG      
    ,RMA_FLG                       
    ,INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG                
    ,REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          
    ,REVENUE_FLG                   
    ,OVERLAY_FLG                   
    ,SALESREP_FLG                  
    ,IC_REVENUE_FLG                
    ,CHARGES_FLG                   
    ,MISC_FLG                      
    ,ACQUISITION_FLG               
    ,'=' AS CORP_BKG_RECOMPUTE_FLAG
    ,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
    ,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
    ,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
    ,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
    ,CAST( NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS ORDER_DTM
    ,CANCELLED_FLG                 
    ,DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM           
    ,DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE  
    ,'OPL' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    ,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
    ,DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  
    ,PRODUCT_KEY                   
    ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
    ,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        
    ,EDW_CREATE_USER          
    ,EDW_UPDATE_USER  
    ,EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
    ,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
    ,DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG   
    ,DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             
    ,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
    ,DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
    ,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
    ,ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD     
    FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE
    WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP'
    AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CLOUD-CBM'

   ) BKG_TRX
   
   INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD
    /*ON BKG_TRX.PROCESS_DATE = FD.CALENDAR_DATE*/
   ON BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = FD.CALENDAR_DATE 
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ETL
     ON (ETL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = FD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
     /*AND BKG_TRX.PROCESS_DATE <= ETL.PROCESS_DATE)*/
     AND BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT <> '1900-01-01')
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
    ON BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
    ON BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER NSEC
    ON(BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  =  NSEC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
    
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SALES_CHANNEL_MATRIX_DVAD CHNL_MTRX
    ON (BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
    BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
        COALESCE(NSEC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)= CHNL_MTRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
        BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY =CHNL_MTRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
   LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
   ON BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
   
   WHERE BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE = 'DVAD'

SELECT 
     BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY    AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
     /*BKG_TRX.PROCESS_DATE     AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,*/
     BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT     AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
     'ERP'       AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
     CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY   AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
     --CHNL_MTRX.SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG   AS 
   CASE 
      --WHEN BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'N' 
                    WHEN BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CLOUD-CBM' THEN 'N' 
              WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
              WHEN BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE= 'DVAD' THEN 'Y'
              --WHEN CHNL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'Y'
              WHEN CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'N'
              WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
       CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
       RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'Y'
             ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'N'
             ELSE 'Y' END END     
             WHEN (MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'Y'      
       WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'N' 
       WHEN MPH.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'Y' 
  ELSE 'N'
         END CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
     CHNL_MTRX.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG   AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
     'N'      AS DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG 
     ,USER       AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
     ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)    AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
      /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
     CASE WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 'OTHERS'
   WHEN CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='N' AND NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT > 0  THEN 'DIRECT'
   WHEN  CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'  /*AND (BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS' OR BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS_ADJ' )*/ THEN '1-TIER'
   ELSE 'OTHERS'
   END  DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD,
  CASE 
  WHEN BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CLOUD-CBM' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
      --WHEN BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE = 'RB' THEN 'REBATES' 
              WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
              WHEN BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE= 'DVAD' THEN 'CHANNEL'
              --WHEN CHNL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' THEN 'CHANNEL'
              WHEN CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
              WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'PROVIDER' THEN
       CASE WHEN --MPH.PARTNER_TYPE_CD='SP' AND 
       RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE <> 'SERVICE PROVIDER' THEN 'CHANNEL'
             ELSE CASE WHEN PSH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = PEH.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT  THEN 'NON CHANNEL'
             ELSE 'CHANNEL' END END     
             WHEN (MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'RESELLER' OR MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1='DISTRIBUTOR') THEN 'CHANNEL'      
       WHEN MPH.DV_PARTNER_PRIMARY_PRACTICE_L1 = 'NON-RESELLER' THEN 'NON CHANNEL' 
       WHEN MPH.PARTNER_TIER_CD = '1-TIER' THEN 'CHANNEL' 
  ELSE 'NON CHANNEL'
         END BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE 
    FROM 
    (
    SEL 
    BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
    ,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
    ,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     
    ,CONVERSION_DT                 
    ,SALES_REP_NUMBER              
    ,TRANSACTION_DATETIME          
    ,TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT   
    ,SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            
    ,CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE          
    ,SPLIT_PERCENTAGE              
    ,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
    ,DD_SERVICE_FLAG               
    ,DD_CORP_BKG_FLAG              
    ,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
    ,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
    ,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
    ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
    ,CONVERSION_RT                 
    ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
    ,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
    ,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER         
    ,BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME        
    ,FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          
    ,BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE           
    ,NET_PRICE_AMOUNT              
    ,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          
    /*,PROCESS_DATE                  */
     ,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT
    ,BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE          
    ,SALES_ORDER_KEY               
    ,DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG        
    ,DD_RMA_FLAG                   
    ,DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG    
    ,DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG      
    ,DD_REVENUE_FLAG               
    ,DD_OVERLAY_FLAG               
    ,DD_SALESREP_FLAG              
    ,DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG            
    ,DD_CHARGES_FLAG               
    ,DD_MISC_FLAG                  
    ,DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG           
    ,CORP_BKG_RECOMPUTE_FLAG       
    ,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
    ,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
    ,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
    ,ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
    ,ORDER_DTM                     
    ,CANCELLED_FLG                 
    ,RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME      
    ,SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE     
    ,SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE            
    ,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
    ,SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT    
    ,PRODUCT_KEY                   
    ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
    ,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    
    ,EDW_CREATE_USER          
    ,EDW_UPDATE_USER  
    ,EDW_CREATE_DTM
    ,EDW_UPDATE_DTM
    ,DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    
    ,DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  
    ,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
    ,DV_PRODUCT_KEY
    ,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
                ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
    FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX
    UNION ALL
    SEL 
    BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
    ,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
    ,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     
    ,CONVERSION_DT                 
    ,SALES_REP_NUMBER              
    ,TRANSACTION_DATETIME          
    ,TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT   
    ,SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            
    ,CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE          
    ,SPLIT_PERCENTAGE              
    ,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
    ,DD_SERVICE_FLAG               
    ,DD_CORP_BKG_FLAG              
    ,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
    ,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
    ,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
    ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
    ,CONVERSION_RT                 
    ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
    ,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
    ,PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER         
    ,BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME        
    ,FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          
    ,BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE           
    ,NET_PRICE_AMOUNT              
    ,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          
     /*,PROCESS_DATE                  */
     ,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT                
    ,BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE          
    ,SALES_ORDER_KEY               
    ,DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG        
    ,DD_RMA_FLAG                   
    ,DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG    
    ,DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG      
    ,DD_REVENUE_FLAG               
    ,DD_OVERLAY_FLAG               
    ,DD_SALESREP_FLAG              
    ,DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG            
    ,DD_CHARGES_FLAG               
    ,DD_MISC_FLAG                  
    ,DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG           
    ,CORP_BKG_RECOMPUTE_FLAG       
    ,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
    ,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
    ,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
    ,ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            
    ,ORDER_DTM                     
    ,CANCELLED_FLG                 
    ,RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME      
    ,SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE     
    ,SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE            
    ,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
    ,SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT    
    ,PRODUCT_KEY                   
    ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
    ,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    
    ,EDW_CREATE_USER          
    ,EDW_UPDATE_USER  
    ,EDW_CREATE_DTM
    ,EDW_UPDATE_DTM
    ,DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    
    ,DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  
    ,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
    ,DV_PRODUCT_KEY
    ,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
                ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
   FROM
    $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_DEBOOKINGS_TRX WHERE CANCEL_CODE='Lost Order' OR BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY < 0
UNION ALL /* CBM Changes */
SELECT
    BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT MOD 100 AS BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
    ,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     
    ,CONVERSION_DT
    ,SALES_REP_NUMBER
    ,TRANSACTION_DATETIME
    ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT
    ,SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
    ,CAST('OPL' AS CHAR(50)) as CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE
    ,BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT/100 AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
    ,SERVICE_FLG                   
    ,CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        
    ,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
    ,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
    ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,CONVERSION_RT
    ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    ,DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           
    ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
    ,CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME
    ,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           
    ,CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE
    ,CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
    ,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY  AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY
    ,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT         
    ,DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            
    ,SALES_ORDER_KEY     
    ,'=' AS DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG      
    ,RMA_FLG                       
    ,INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG                
    ,REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          
    ,REVENUE_FLG                   
    ,OVERLAY_FLG                   
    ,SALESREP_FLG                  
    ,IC_REVENUE_FLG                
    ,CHARGES_FLG                   
    ,MISC_FLG                      
    ,ACQUISITION_FLG               
    ,'=' AS CORP_BKG_RECOMPUTE_FLAG
    ,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
    ,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
    ,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
    ,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
    ,CAST(-999 AS BIGINT) AS ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT
    ,CAST( NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS ORDER_DTM
    ,CANCELLED_FLG                 
    ,DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM           
    ,DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE  
    ,'OPL' AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    ,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
    ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
    ,DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  
    ,PRODUCT_KEY                   
    ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
    ,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        
    ,EDW_CREATE_USER          
    ,EDW_UPDATE_USER  
    ,EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
    ,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
    ,DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG   
    ,DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             
    ,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
    ,DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
    ,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    ,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
                ,ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD 
    FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE
    WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP'
    AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'CLOUD-CBM'
    ) BKG_TRX
    
    INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD
     /*ON BKG_TRX.PROCESS_DATE = FD.CALENDAR_DATE*/
    ON BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = FD.CALENDAR_DATE
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ETL
     ON (ETL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = FD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND 
     /*BKG_TRX.PROCESS_DATE <= ETL.PROCESS_DATE)*/
     BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT <> '1900-01-01')
    INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
     ON BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
     ON BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER NSEC
     ON(BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  =  NSEC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
     
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SALES_CHANNEL_MATRIX CHNL_MTRX
     ON ( BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND
         BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
         BKG_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
      BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  = CHNL_MTRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
         COALESCE(NSEC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) = CHNL_MTRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY AND
         CASE 
      WHEN BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
      THEN CAST(-777 AS Integer)
      ELSE COALESCE(NSEC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) 
         END     = CHNL_MTRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY)
  AND CASE WHEN NSO.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD IN ('CCW-FSUB','SOWB-FSUB','REVCLOUD-SALESMAIN') THEN NSO.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY
  ELSE -999 END
  =CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_BILL_TO_CUST_PARTY_KEY  /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA */
     LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
    ON BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
    LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_PARTNER_HIERARCHY MPH 
    ON CHNL_MTRX.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY=MPH.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
    AND MPH.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY > 0
    LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PEH 
    ON PEH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=COALESCE(NSEC.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
    LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SOLDTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER PSH 
    ON PSH.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  /*  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PRTNR_GLBL_RPRTG_PRFL PTNR
    ON PTNR.PARTNER_CNTRY_PRTY_KEY = MPH.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY     
    AND PTNR.BK_RPRTG_PROFILE_TYPE_NAME    ='PARTNER PRIMARY PRACTICE L1'
    AND PTNR.EFFECTIVE_END_DT='3500-01-01'
    AND MPH.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY  > 0 */
    WHERE BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE <> 'DVAD'
